query: UPDATE users SET openId = CONCAT('email:', email) WHERE openId IS NULL AND email IS NOT NULL AND loginMethod = 'email';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Pj14a2EnUFM8XE.root --database NZpifSW9BTrd6QobKPrRSL --execute UPDATE users SET openId = CONCAT('email:', email) WHERE openId IS NULL AND email IS NOT NULL AND loginMethod = 'email';
